note: All Serper-sourced REAL-photo pulls for this specific lead (2 pulls under the business-name query) were mis-attributed to other grooming businesses and rejected — 0 kept real photos of Elegant Dog Parlour itself. A further top-up pull under a generic 'dog spa bath tub grooming close up' query was used for STOCK sourcing per SOP Step 2; two of its results (stock_01, stock_04) replaced two initially-kept candidates that preflight.js flagged as exact cross-client MD5 duplicates of durban-mobile-groomers/images/stock_01.jpg and stock_02.jpg. Replacements were hash-checked against every other client's images/ folder before being kept — no collisions found. Build is stock-led; footer disclosure added per SOP.
